title: S&P 500 slips Friday, but index posts best week since November after fragile Iran ceasefire deal: Live updates
snippet: The S&P 500 fell slightly on Friday, though the index still had its best week since last November.
title_he: מדד S&P 500 יורד ביום שישי, אך רושם את השבוע הטוב מאז נובמבר
snippet_he: מדד S&P 500 ירד קלות ביום שישי, אם כי המדד עדיין רשם את השבוע הטוב ביותר שלו מאז נובמבר שעבר.

title: Iran regime uses former Soviet republic to dodge sanctions, fund war machine: report
snippet: Once a committed U.S. ally, Georgia has quietly aligned with Iran, raising concerns about IRGC influence and sanctions evasion, a new report claims.
title_he: דו"ח: איראן משתמשת ברפובליקה סובייטית לשעבר להתחמקות מסנקציות
snippet_he: דו"ח חדש טוען כי גאורגיה, שהייתה בעבר בעלת ברית מחויבת לארה"ב, התיישרה בשקט עם איראן, מה שמעלה חששות לגבי השפעת משמרות המהפכה והתחמקות מסנקציות.

title: Michael Burry says he's still betting against Palantir after Trump post boosts stock
snippet: The investor of the "Big Short" fame said he continues to hold long-dated put options on the artificial intelligence software firm.
title_he: מייקל בורי אומר שהוא עדיין מהמר נגד פלנטיר, לאחר פוסט של טראמפ שהקפיץ את המניה
snippet_he: המשקיע המפורסם מ״השורט הגדול״ אמר שהוא ממשיך להחזיק באופציות פוט לטווח ארוך על חברת התוכנה לבינה מלאכותית.

title: Iran's speaker says negotiations with U.S. can't start without Lebanon ceasefire, asset release
snippet: President Trump is frustrated by Iran continuing to throttle most shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz, the world's most important oil route.

title: Palestinian shot dead during Israeli settler attack on occupied West Bank village
snippet: The killing came as ex-security chiefs warned "government sponsored Jewish terrorism" was out of control.

title: Ireland gridlocked by fuel protests as Iran war drives prices higher
snippet: Protestors are taking issue with the government's response to the spike in fuel prices since the onset of the Iran war.

title: What's at stake ahead of crucial U.S.-Iran peace talks as leaders meet in Pakistan
snippet: Already, Tehran has accused Israel of violating the terms of the ceasefire, as the IDF continues to attack Hezbollah in Lebanon.

title: How many ships are crossing the Strait of Hormuz?

title: Here's the inflation breakdown for March 2026 — in one chart

title: Consumer sentiment hits record low, inflation fears rise amid Iran war
snippet: The university's headline index of consumer sentiment tumbled to 47.6, down 10.7% from March to its lowest on record.
title_he: סנטימנט הצרכנים בשפל היסטורי; חששות מאינפלציה עולים על רקע מלחמת איראן

title: Buy this Israeli defense stock because of its 'battlefield tested tech,' Bank of America says
snippet: Elbit Systems has rallied 60% in less than four months. One analyst says it will continue to gain as global demand for defense technology stays high.
title_he: בנק אוף אמריקה: קנו את מניית הביטחון הישראלית הזו בשל ״טכנולוגיה שנבדקה בשדה קרב״

title: Iran’s ‘Godfather of propaganda’ tactics resurface in war with US and Israel

title: Airports could face a jet fuel crunch within 3 weeks as airlines weigh flight cancellations
snippet: Europe's Airport Industry said if the Strait of Hormuz doesn't reopen "systemic jet fuel shortage is set to become a reality for the EU."

snippet_he: תעשיית שדות התעופה של אירופה אמרה שאם מצר הורמוז לא ייפתח מחדש, ״מחסור מערכתי בדלק סילוני יהפוך למציאות עבור האיחוד האירופי״.

title: Defense's Silicon Valley pivot: Ukraine, Iran wars challenge the legacy playbook
snippet: Companies are betting on a new type of warfare, based on shorter lead times that allow for rapid deployments and more cost-effective solutions.
title_he: מפנה עמק הסיליקון של הביטחון: מלחמות אוקראינה ואיראן מאתגרות את מודל העבר

title: Why ships bound for the Middle East are piling up across Asia
snippet: Congestion in Singapore's waters is rising as the Iran war disrupts shipping routes, forcing vessels bound for the Middle East to drop anchor near its ports.
title_he: מדוע ספינות המיועדות למזרח התיכון נערמות ברחבי אסיה?

title: VP Vance to lead U.S. team in Iran peace talks. And, Artemis II to return to Earth
snippet: Vice President Vance is heading to Pakistan to lead a U.S. team in talks aimed at ending the war in Iran. And, Artemis II is set to return to Earth today.

title: Iran delegates arrive in Islamabad for talks with U.S., as ceasefire terms remain in dispute
snippet: The fragile ceasefire agreement was tested again on Friday after Iran refused to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Israel and Hezbollah traded strikes in Lebanon, and Kuwait was attacked with drones.

title: Vance heads to Pakistan for talks to end the war between Iran, the US and Israel
snippet: Vice President JD Vance enters his highest-profile moment Friday as lead U.S. negotiator in face-to-face talks with Iran.

title: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
snippet: The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks.
title_he: טראמפ: התנהלות איראן במצר הורמוז ״אינה ההסכם שיש לנו״

title: Inside Tehran after strikes: Iranian woman describes fear, checkpoints and people used as ‘human shields’
snippet: An anonymous Iranian woman detailed to The Australian the nightly explosions, celebrations and fear in Tehran as Trump's two-week ceasefire with Iran tentatively took hold.
title_he: בתוך טהראן לאחר התקיפות: איראנית מתארת פחד, מחסומים ואנשים המשמשים ״מגנים אנושיים״

title: Ceasefire or no ceasefire, the Middle East's reshuffling is not yet done
snippet: Both sides have reason to end the war but share no common ground.
